summary: Hotfix Batch 5.8.1 Booking Flow Rescue - All tests PASSED. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests passed. Frontend: Time dropdown verified with 48 options (00:00-23:30, full 24-hour), booking modal navigation working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: 24-hour time dropdown correctly generates 48 options from 00:00 to 23:30
UTC date construction uses explicit 'Z' suffix: new Date(`${selectedDate}T${selectedTime}:00Z`)
Overlap prevention checks both class_sessions AND bookings collections
409 Conflict handling shows specific toast message for double-booking
Frontend passes duration param when fetching available teachers
